title: maltesie/ChimericFragments: v1.0.15
author: Malte Siemers
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
updates Julia package dependencies 
 adds information about the best complementary region for each ligation event into the ligation points table. 
 
 To update tables, just rerun the analysis on an existing config / results folder.
